======= RMA03170James Dunn papers27-2-3170Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
James Dunn papers
Dunn, James A.
American Institutes for Research
27-2-3170
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
1966-1990. Correspondence, articles, manuscripts, manuals, photographs, film reels, reports, educational materials, notes, theses. Materials concerning the American Institutes for Research, education norms, vocational education, educational psychology and Dunn's career in the Education Department at Cornell University. Collection material in English 4069424
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
January 2, 2002
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, August 2003Series list added by Carolyn Smith October, 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Education, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, articles, manuals, guides, course material, photographs and movies concerning the American Institutes for Research, education norms, vocational education, educational psychology and Dunn's career in the Education Department at Cornell University.
SERIES LIST
Series I. American Institutes for Research (AIR), 1968-1977)
Boxes 1-2
Series II. OST, 1966-1979
Boxes 3-4
Series III. YETP: Basic Skills, 1980-1990
Box 3 Folder 8Box 4 Folders 32-36Boxes 5-7
Cite As:
James Dunn papers, #27-2-3170. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Vocational education -- United States. Educational psychology -- Study and teaching. Education -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
